description: Merge two sorted sequences into a single sorted sequence.
Select the element from the 'left' sequence if it is less than or equal to the element from the 'right' sequence.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Remove the last element from the 'merged' sequence if it is the same as the last elements of both 'left' and 'right' sequences.
Iterate over the 'left' and 'right' sequences to merge them.
